transfers.title: Operations room
transfers.description: Turn squad needs into targets, reports, negotiations and completed deals without losing sight of the salary cap.
transfers.openHint: You can negotiate, recruit and resolve deals this turn.
transfers.closedHint: Prepare targets and contracts for the next window.
transfers.primaryDetail: You are tracking {{count}} targets. Compare fit, cost and salary room before opening negotiations.

competition.title: Competition centre
competition.description: Calendar, standings, matches and the wider competitive world brought together to read the season at a glance.
competition.toolsHint: Your season and the FDF world
competition.noNextHint: Check the calendar and active competitions.
competition.primaryFallbackDetail: There is no confirmed next match yet.

club.title: Club boardroom
club.description: Run finances, stadium, staff, supporters and the institutional future from one executive desk.
club.diagnosisHint: Club sustainability depends on balance between cash, structure, supporters and facilities.
club.primaryDetail: Review forecasts, payroll and revenue before committing resources to works, staff or transfers.

community.title: FDF Square
community.description: News, conversations, forum and social rituals in one meeting place that makes the world feel alive.
community.statusHint: The conversation changes with every matchday, transfer and rivalry.
community.primaryDetail: Open the archive to review reports, press conferences and stories from the world.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.hint: Press g then a key to navigate. ? toggles this help.

auth.hero: A retro tactical management MMO. Rise from the third tier, run the stadium, the pitch and even election polls. Master the real-time market.
auth.featureTacticsDesc: Design systems down to the millimetre, drill set pieces and adapt your style to the opponent.
auth.featureEconomyDesc: Manage attendance, sponsorships, contracts, maintenance and the finances of a growing club.
auth.featureMultiDesc: Sign, auction and negotiate directly with other human managers in a competitive ecosystem.
auth.credentialsPrompt: > ENTER CREDENTIALS TO MANAGE YOUR CLUB

register.title: MANAGER SIGN-UP
register.prompt: REGISTER YOUR FEDERATION ID TO GET STARTED
register.acceptTerms: I accept the federation rules and privacy policy
register.errorWeakPassword: Password does not meet minimum security requirements
register.errorUsername: Username must be 3–30 characters (letters, numbers or _)
register.errorTerms: You must accept the rules to register

empty.title: Nothing here
empty.message: There doesn't seem to be any information available right now.

ux.matchdayImpact: Your lineup and tactics will apply in the next simulation.

context.competitionDecision: Read the context and choose the challenge

tactics.title: Match plan updated
tactics.effect: The lineup, roles and style change how your team will compete.
tactics.timing: It will be measured in the next match.

training.title: Training plan updated
training.effect: Workload and focus will alter fitness, growth and physical risk.
training.timing: The effect is processed over the next turns.

transfers.title: Market move registered
transfers.effect: The deal changes budget, wages or squad depth.
transfers.timing: Resolution depends on the negotiation status.

staff.title: Backroom structure changed
staff.effect: Staff quality influences training, recovery and scouting.
staff.timing: Bonuses apply from the next turn.

stadium.title: Stadium decision confirmed
stadium.effect: Investment affects revenue, capacity and fan experience.
stadium.timing: Works and costs progress with each turn.

academy.title: Academy decision confirmed
academy.effect: Youth development and opportunities will change.
academy.timing: Progress will appear over the next turns.

fans.title: Fan action started
fans.effect: Supporter mood can alter pressure, backing and revenue.
fans.timing: The response appears after the next turn.

economy.title: Financial decision registered
economy.effect: Liquidity, risk and future investment capacity have changed.
economy.timing: The forecast updates with the next balance.

identity.title: Club identity updated
identity.effect: Your values condition bonuses, narrative and future choices.
identity.timing: Effects remain active from now on.

press.title: Message sent to the FDF world
press.effect: Tone influences the dressing room, supporters and public perception.
press.timing: Reaction arrives through news and upcoming turns.

career.title: Career decision confirmed
career.effect: Your progress, prestige or access to opportunities has changed.

choose_club.objective: Choose a club and define your identity
choose_club.look: Compare objectives, budget and competitive context.
choose_club.consequence: Your choice sets the starting point of your career.

club_context.objective: Understand your club and the next turn
club_context.look: Start with the objective and priority decisions.
club_context.consequence: You will know which problem to solve before spending time or money.

review_squad.objective: Meet the squad you will manage
review_squad.look: Review absences, contracts, morale and weak positions.
review_squad.consequence: You will spot what tactics or recruitment must fix.

tactics_lineup.look: Choose a lineup, formation and coherent playing idea.
tactics_lineup.consequence: The match engine will use these decisions in the next fixture.

training_plan.look: Adjust workload and focus to the needs of your XI.
training_plan.consequence: Fitness, growth and injury risk will change.

market_first_move.objective: Explore the market with a purpose
market_first_move.look: Compare fit, cost and wage room.
market_first_move.consequence: Every deal affects squad and cash.

watch_match.objective: Experience and analyse your first match
watch_match.look: Follow key moments, statistics and tactical explanations.
watch_match.consequence: The result affects morale, board, fans and your next decisions.

postMatchAnalysis.even: A tight match that could have gone either way
postMatchAnalysis.drawAgainstFlow: The scoreline does not tell the full story
postMatchAnalysis.deserved: The result confirms what happened on the pitch
postMatchAnalysis.smashAndGrab: Maximum efficiency in a test of resistance
postMatchAnalysis.turningPoint: The moment that changed the script came in the {{minute}}': {{play}}
postMatchAnalysis.noTurningPoint: There was no single swing: the match was decided by accumulation.
